calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Off Calendar

Application For A Prove Up Hearing Date To Have Default Judgment Entered Against Deft'S And Pos
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for the plaintiff Creditors Trade Assoc., Inc. dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Witness for plaintiff: Susan Strebeck and Gary Looney, placd under oath and testifies.
Default of Defendants United Property Holdings, LLC has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,237.06
Prejudgment Interest $6,019.37
Attorneys' fees - To be by motion
Costs - $480.00 for a Total of $39,736.43
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Continued To Sep-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Continued To May-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
